Docs.summary: Represents an for the OpenAI Realtime API over WebSocket.

Docs.param: The to monitor for cancellation requests.
Docs.summary: Connects the WebSocket to the OpenAI Realtime API.
Docs.returns: A task representing the asynchronous connect operation.
Docs.exception: The session was not created with an owned realtime client.
